2150900.name: Celtique
2150900.description:
Celtique (Celestial Boutique) is a high-speed rhythm driving game set on a hostile alien world where music is your only navigation system.

Race across vast extraterrestrial landscapes as every turn, boost, and drift is synchronized to the beat. The track is the song - master momentum, timing, and flow as you push your vehicle through biomechanical highways that react dynamically to the music.

This is not a traditional racing game. Speed alone is not enough. Precision, musical awareness, and instinct define survival.

Key Features

  • Rhythm-Driven Gameplay – Steering, acceleration, boosts, and hazards are fully synchronized to the soundtrack

  • Dynamic Visuals – The world pulses, shifts, and evolves with the music

Celtique is about entering a trance—where engine noise fades, rhythm takes control, and the road becomes music.

Drive the beat.
Become the rhythm.
